race.comment: SAVAGERY VIBE (5) is knocking on the door of another victory with three consecutive runner-up finishes and strikes a winnable contest here. Is yet to miss a drum in three spins around this circuit and looks the one they all have to run down. BEREZKA (11) has placed four from four over this track and trip and will be rock-hard fit for this. Respect from the Maher yard. BLAKEMORE AVENUE (10) grows a leg for hoop Brooker who has three wins and a placing from just five steers. Has to be included from the low draw. BLUE SPINEL (3) is a four-time winner at this circuit who gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. In the mix. JOY A PLENTY (6) has put back-to-back Ipswich wins together and shouldn't be underestimated.
